title: Monitoring and Logging Stack on Amazon EKS
summary: Full observability stack on EKS with Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, and Fluent Bit for containerized Node.js microservices.
highlights: Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, and Fluent Bit monitoring containerized workloads.
Custom Grafana dashboards for real-time metrics and logs across microservices.

title: Containerized App Deployment with IaC
summary: Automated deployment of a containerized Nginx app on ECS EC2 using Terraform and GitLab CI.
highlights: Infrastructure fully defined in Terraform: VPC, ECS cluster, ASG, ECR.
GitLab CI automates validation, build, deployment, and vertical scaling.

title: Instance Scheduler
summary: Terraform and AWS Lambda driven scheduler automating EC2 start/stop lifecycles with cron-style tags.
highlights: Lambda and CloudWatch Events automate schedules across DEV, UAT, PROD.
Cron-style tag expressions, all actions logged to CloudWatch.

title: Component Watcher
summary: Multi-threaded monitoring solution with Datadog integration and automatic process restarts.
highlights: Concurrent component monitoring with PID and uptime tracking.
AWS Secrets Manager, SES, and Datadog integration, configured via YAML.

title: Operations Dashboard
summary: Full-stack dashboard (FastAPI + React) for EC2 inventory, schedules, Route 53, and dev server control.
highlights: EC2 details and schedules with filtering, Route 53 failover toggling.
Developers start and stop dev servers without touching the AWS console.

title: FTP File Downloader
summary: Python tool for automated FTP file management with validation, backups, and email summaries.
highlights: Automates FTP downloads, comparisons, and pattern-based updates.
ISIN validation, backups, rotating logs, email notifications.
